text: If Permissive is false, turn off Req
If Permissive is false, turn off Req
If both requests are on at the same time, turn off the older one so you can change directions.
If extend commanded set valves and start timer
If there is a extend sensor and the timer runs out return fault, Shutdown valves
If retract commanded set valves and start timer
If retract commanded set valves and start timer
If there is a retract sensor and the timer runs out return fault, Shutdown valves
Set Extend Complete if everything OK
Set Extend Complete once post delay is finished
Set Retract Complete if everything OK
Set RetractComplete once post delay is finished
Store the state of the requests for future reference.  Keep this at the end of the routine
